title: lotus americanus var. glaber
intro: Lotus americanus var. glaber, also known as American lotus, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lotus americanus var. glaber include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
